rationale: Human NORMAL/MASL/MASH single-nucleus and multiomic liver dataset centered on HSC activation and anti-fibrotic target discovery.
Human NAFLD/NASH biopsy bulk RNA-seq useful for directionality checks, especially HSC-secreted biomarkers such as SMOC2.
Most relevant for macrophage-state validation, but access/export format is less scriptable than GEO in this local run.
